title: Triathlon athletes not scared of a little rain
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Despite rainy conditions, athletes of all ages took part in the Eden Triathlon open event in Great Brak River on Sunday 2 March.


> The event welcomed participants of varying skill levels, offering three distance categories:


Standard: 1 500m swim, 40km cycle and 10km run

Sprint: 750m swim, 20km cycle and 5km run

Super Sprint: 400m swim, 10km cycle and 2.5km run

The day provided a great opportunity for both seasoned triathletes and newcomers to test their endurance and enjoy the sport in a supportive environment.

Click here for results.

Fred van Zyl

Father and son, Rayn and Noah Habib Photos: Deidre Cloete‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
